name: B/m Mozzarella Tomato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine in the order given.
2. Start the machine at the bottom setting for a Welbilt/Dak model.
3. Set the crust to light and bake on the white bread setting.
4. Enjoy your bread, thinking about how delicious it will be as a sandwich in a few hours.
5. Consider adding pepperoni next time to have all sandwich ingredients in each slice, enhancing the pizza flavor.
